boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the public-sector operator execute the citizen-record or casework action now? Focus: appeal deadline extension.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact CTL record confirms boundary closure per policy rule.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No source defect remains open for escalation.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current policy exception and appeal ID match confirmed.

critical_features_preserved: current policy exception and appeal ID match
final_answer: Source records close the exact action boundary for the appeal deadline extension. The controlling CTL record confirms the current policy exception and appeal ID match, and policy says execution may proceed only when source records close the exact boundary. No open defect remains, so the action may proceed.
